title: PayPal To Post Q3 Earnings: What's In The Offing
text: PayPal was scheduled to report Q3 2021 results on November 8, with consensus expected revenue growth of 14% and EPS growth of 1% year-over-year. The company projected Q3 revenues between $6.15 billion and $6.25 billion, with year-over-year growth of 13-14%. Some analysts expected PayPal to increase revenue by approximately 22 to 25% versus 20% guidance and EPS by 25-30% versus 22% guidance.
